goal: Generate a single Phase 2 closeout artifact that summarizes phase state, held decisions, deferred risks, and whether the repository is ready to stop opening Phase 2 packages and plan Phase 3.
successCriteria: A single closeout report renders phase policy state, promotion-sensitive modules, held decisions, deferred risks, and Phase 3 readiness.
The closeout report is published by CI and linked from tracked review handoff output.
Release owner and antigravity can use the closeout report instead of replaying transcripts to determine whether Phase 2 can close.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Introducing new SDK runtime or provider features.
Replacing the verification report with a completely new artifact family.
